{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work (in-model approaches) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement is demonstrated in the output.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for specific claims (novelty, measurements), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set with no drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the output.",
    "RX.5": "No annotation of sources or reasons is provided for non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work (in-model approaches) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement is demonstrated in the output.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for specific claims (novelty, measurements), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set with no drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: No annotation of sources or reasons is provided for non-cosmetic changes.
